# SectorCalc — Full Tool Index & Description
> Comprehensive reference for all SectorCalc calculators, tools, and resources.
> Generated: 2026-07-12
> Last updated: 2026-07-12

SectorCalc provides sector-specific calculators for manufacturing, engineering, construction, logistics, energy, finance, operations, sustainability, and technical business decisions. Each tool below has a deterministic, auditable calculation engine with server-side execution.

## Free Calculators (Browser-First, Privacy-First)

### Manufacturing & Machining
- [Machining Cost per Part](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/machining-cost-per-part): Calculate per-part machining cost including material, labor, overhead, and machine time.
- [CNC Shop Hourly Rate](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/cnc-shop-hourly-rate): Determine your CNC shop's fully-loaded hourly rate for quoting accuracy.
- [Cutting Speed & Feed RPM](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/cutting-speed-feed-rpm): Compute optimal cutting speed and feed rate for turning, milling, and drilling operations. Reference: ISO 513.
- [Tap Drill Size](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/tap-drill-size): Find the correct tap drill diameter for standard thread sizes.
- [ISO 286 Tolerance Fit](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/iso-286-tolerance-fit): Calculate hole/shaft tolerance limits per ISO 286. Reference: ISO 286.
- [Surface Roughness Converter](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/surface-roughness-converter): Convert between Ra, Rz, Rmax, and RMS surface roughness values.
- [Material Removal Rate](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/material-removal-rate): Compute MRR for milling, turning, and drilling operations.
- [Tool Life & Tool Cost Per Part](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/tool-life-tool-cost-per-part): Estimate tool life using Taylor's tool life equation and per-part tooling cost.
- [Thread Dimensions Reference](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/thread-dimensions-reference): Reference major, minor, and pitch diameters for standard thread series.

### Quality & Scrap
- [Scrap Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/scrap-cost): Calculate total scrap cost including material, labor, and overhead losses.
- [Rework vs Scrap Decision](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/rework-vs-scrap-decision): Compare cost of rework versus scrapping a defective part.
- [OEE Calculator](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/oee): Overall Equipment Effectiveness per ISO 22400. Reference: ISO 22400-2:2014.
- [Downtime Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/downtime-cost): Calculate the cost of unplanned downtime including lost production and labor.

### Welding & Fabrication
- [Weld Metal Weight & Consumable](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/weld-metal-weight-consumable): Estimate weld metal deposit weight and consumable usage.
- [Fillet Weld Size & Strength](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/fillet-weld-size-strength): Verify fillet weld throat thickness and strength capacity per AWS D1.1/EC3. Reference: AWS D1.1, EC3.
- [Welding Cost Per Meter](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/welding-cost-per-meter): Calculate cost per meter of weld including labor, consumables, and overhead.
- [Welding Heat Input](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/welding-heat-input): Compute arc energy and heat input for welding procedure specification.

### Fasteners & Joints
- [Bolt Torque](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/bolt-torque): Calculate recommended torque for bolt tightening per VDI 2230. Reference: VDI 2230.
- [Bolt Preload & Clamp Force](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/bolt-preload-clamp-force): Determine bolt preload, clamp force, and joint stiffness.

### Materials & Weight
- [Steel Weight](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/steel-weight): Calculate weight of steel beams, plates, pipes, and bars per EN 10025. Reference: EN 10025-2.
- [Beam Load & Deflection Quick Check](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/beam-load-deflection-quick-check): Quick structural beam deflection check for simple loading cases.
- [Sheet Metal Bend Allowance](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/sheet-metal-bend-allowance): Calculate bend allowance and flat pattern length for sheet metal.

### Manufacturing & Productivity
- [Takt Time & Cycle Time](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/takt-time-cycle-time): Calculate takt time, cycle time, and required operator count for production lines.
- [Setup Time Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/setup-time-cost): Quantify the cost of machine setup time including lost production.
- [Line Balancing Efficiency](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/line-balancing-efficiency): Compute line balance efficiency, smoothness index, and bottleneck analysis.

### Energy & Utilities
- [Compressed Air Leak Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/compressed-air-leak-cost): Calculate annual cost of compressed air leaks per ISO 11011. Reference: ISO 11011.
- [Electric Motor Running Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/electric-motor-running-cost): Estimate annual electricity cost for electric motor operation.
- [Energy Cost Per Part](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/energy-cost-per-part): Allocate energy cost per manufactured part.

### Carbon & Sustainability
- [CBAM Cost Quick Estimator](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/cbam-cost-quick-estimator): Quick estimate of CBAM certificate cost exposure. Reference: EU CBAM Regulation.
- [Electricity CO2 Emissions](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/electricity-co2-emissions): Calculate CO2 emissions from electricity consumption per GHG Protocol. Reference: GHG Protocol Scope 2.
- [Diesel Fuel CO2 Emissions](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/diesel-fuel-co2-emissions): Calculate CO2 emissions from diesel fuel combustion. Reference: GHG Protocol Scope 1.
- [Product Carbon Footprint Basic](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/product-carbon-footprint-basic): Basic product carbon footprint estimation using emission factors.
- [Carbon Price Exposure](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/carbon-price-exposure): Estimate financial exposure to carbon pricing mechanisms.

### Cost & Finance
- [True Employee Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/true-employee-cost): Calculate fully-loaded employee cost including salary, taxes, benefits, and overhead.
- [Quote Margin & Markup](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/quote-margin-markup): Determine selling price from cost plus desired margin or markup.
- [Break-Even Point](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/break-even-point): Calculate break-even quantity and revenue from fixed and variable costs.
- [Payment Term Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/payment-term-cost): Quantify the cost impact of different payment terms on working capital.
- [Machine Investment Payback](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/machine-investment-payback): Calculate payback period and ROI for capital equipment investment.

### Inventory & Logistics
- [EOQ Calculator](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/eoq): Economic Order Quantity including holding, ordering, and shortage costs.
- [Safety Stock & Reorder Point](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/safety-stock-reorder-point): Calculate safety stock and reorder point from demand variability.
- [Inventory Carrying Cost](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/inventory-carrying-cost): Compute total inventory carrying cost including storage, capital, and obsolescence.
- [Pallet & Container Load CBM](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/pallet-container-load-cbm): Calculate cubic meter utilization for pallet and container loading.
- [Freight Cost Per KM Trip](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/freight-cost-per-km-trip): Calculate freight cost per kilometer including fuel, maintenance, and driver cost.

### Construction
- [Rebar Weight & Count](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/rebar-weight-count): Calculate rebar weight, count, and total cost per EN 10080. Reference: EN 10080.
- [Concrete Volume Order Quantity](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/concrete-volume-order-quantity): Calculate concrete volume needed for slabs, columns, beams, and footings.

### Food & Beverage
- [Recipe Cost & Menu Price](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/recipe-cost-menu-price): Calculate recipe cost per portion and suggested menu price.

### Textile & Apparel
- [Fabric Consumption GSM](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/free/fabric-consumption-gsm): Estimate fabric consumption per garment based on GSM, width, and efficiency.

## Pro Calculators (Premium Tools — Paywall Gated)

### Finance & Working Capital
- [Break-Even & Survival Cash](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/break-even-survival-cash-calculator): Multi-factor break-even analysis with survival runway, contribution gap, and stress-tested cash position. Deterministic SME finance model.
- [Machine Hourly Rate Proof Report](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/machine-hourly-rate-proof-report): Fully-loaded machine hourly rate with depreciation, power, maintenance, floor space, and overhead allocation. Auditable rate sheet.
- [Loss-Making Job Detector](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/loss-making-job-detector): Identify jobs that destroy profitability after fully-allocated costing. Margin leak detection engine.
- [Receivables Cost & Payment Term Addendum](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/receivables-cost-payment-term-addendum): Quantify the true cost of extended payment terms including financing, discounting, dispute, and collection risk.

### Operations & Finance
- [SMED Setup Time Reduction ROI](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/setup-time-reduction-roi-smed): SMED project ROI including batch savings, capacity gain, defect reduction, and payback period.
- [Product SKU Margin Ranker](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/product-sku-margin-ranker): Rank SKUs by absolute margin, margin percentage, and volume-weighted contribution. Pareto analysis for product rationalization.
- [True Employee Cost Statement](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/true-employee-cost-statement): Fully-loaded employee cost including salary, bonus, benefits, payroll tax, retirement, training, equipment, travel, facilities, and management overhead.

### Cost & Pricing
- [Job Quote Builder Pro Pack](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/job-quote-builder-pro-pack): Comprehensive job quote costing: material, labor, overhead, setup, travel, subcontractor, equipment, engineering, markup, commission, and warranty reserve.
- [Machine Investment Feasibility (Buy/Lease/Keep)](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/machine-investment-feasibility-buy-lease-keep): Buy vs. lease vs. keep analysis with NPV, total cost, ROI, and scenario comparison for capital equipment decisions.
- [Capital Equipment Investment Appraisal (NPV/IRR)](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/capital-equipment-investment-appraisal-npv-irr): Full DCF-driven capital investment appraisal: NPV, IRR, payback, MIRR, profitability index, and Monte Carlo risk simulation.

### Profitability & Cost
- [Customer/SKU Profitability Forensics](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/customer-sku-profitability-forensics): Customer and SKU profitability analysis: contribution margin, customer lifetime value, acquisition cost, retention cost, payment term impact, and dispute risk.
- [Downtime & Scrap Loss Statement](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/downtime-scrap-loss-statement): Comprehensive loss statement covering downtime, scrap, rework, sorting, inspection, and lost contribution — ISO 9001 deliverable format.
- [OEE Loss Monetization & Improvement Business Case](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/oee-loss-monetization-improvement-business-case): Convert OEE losses to monetary impact. Build improvement business case with expected OEE gain, investment, ROI, and payback.
- [Scrap & Rework Cost Tracker](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/scrap-rework-cost-tracker): Track and allocate scrap and rework costs across material, labor, inspection, sorting, disposal, and lost contribution.

### Sourcing & Operations
- [Outsource vs In-House Analyzer](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/outsource-vs-in-house-analyzer): Total cost comparison for outsource vs. in-house: material, labor, overhead, setup, quality, logistics, switching cost, and strategic scoring.
- [Plant-Wide Shop Rate & Cost Structure Audit](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/plant-wide-shop-rate-cost-structure-audit): Decompose total plant costs into machine groups, overhead pools, labor, energy, floor space, and maintenance. Build auditable shop rate.
- [FX & Commodity Pass-Through Pricer](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/fx-commodity-pass-through-pricer): Price escalation model for FX and commodity risk: hedge efficiency, threshold compliance, and cumulative pass-through impact.

### Energy & Sustainability
- [Energy Efficiency Grant & Incentive Feasibility Pack](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/energy-efficiency-grant-incentive-feasibility-pack): Energy efficiency project feasibility: kWh savings, grant coverage probability, NPV, IRR, carbon reduction, and production impact — grant application-ready.
- [Motor & Compressor Replacement ROI](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/motor-compressor-replacement-roi): Energy efficiency replacement ROI for motors and compressors: kWh savings, NPV, IRR, payback, carbon credit value, and tax incentive inclusion.

### Fabrication
- [Weld Procedure Cost & Consumable Estimation Suite](https://sectorcalc.com/tools/pro/weld-procedure-cost-consumable-estimation-suite): Comprehensive weld cost estimation: wire, gas, labor, overhead, power, grinding, inspection, rework, and pre/post-weld treatment.

## About
SectorCalc is an industrial calculation platform for cost, efficiency, risk, and compliance decisions across 27+ sectors. Calculations use ISO, ASTM, EN, ACI, AISC, ASME, AWS standards where applicable.

**Methodology:** All calculator results are deterministic, server-side computed using published engineering formulas and standards. Inputs are processed with unit conversion and physical bounds validation.

**Privacy:** Free calculators process all data in-browser. PRO tools require authentication for premium report generation.

**Contact:** info@sectorcalc.com | +90 539 333 3303
**Address:** Folkart Towers Yanyolu No:47, 35530 Bayrakli/Izmir, Turkey
**Last update:** 2026-07-12
